rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2021 line 1. REAL PARTY IN INTEREST LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution is DENIED without prejudice, subject to Petitioner setting the hearing on the Petition for Writ of Mandate. Notice and supporting documents shall be filed and served no later 5:00 p.m. on January 21, 2021. (See paragraph 19 of counsel opposition declaration). If the hearing is not set, this motion will be granted. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEFINA PACUMIO VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A A BUSINESS ENTITY
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 22, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in PART and OVERRULED in PART. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the causes of action for Violation of CCC 2924.17, conversion, unjust enrichment - these causes of action are based on unsupported theory regarding 125% cap provision in the contract. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for UCL violation - plaintiff fails to allege any facts in support of any available remedy under this statute; Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the violation of Rosenthal Act - Plaintiff failed to cite authority or allege facts to show that foreclose is a debt collection activity within the meaning of the Act. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Causes of action for wrongful foreclosure, fraud and intentional interference with contractual relations are sufficiently alleged. = (501/CFH)
